title: Webinar by Ms. Katyayani Sanjay Bhatia
content: Feb, 12 2022 at 11:00 am GMeet Webinar by Ms. Katyayani Sanjay Bhatia She is an officer in the Indian Revenue Service of 2018 Batch. Before joining the Government service, she has worked in the technical (IBM, Microsoft) and financial fields (State Bank of India). A voracious reader, an ardent admirer of Indian handlooms, she also mentors students for competitive examinations and runs her own blog, “The Melange” ( https://katyayanibhatia.wordpress.com ). She is very passionate about gender issues, and as a probationer, started gender sensitisation sessions in LBSNAA, Mussoorie, and continues to contribute on gender issues. She has recently co-founded a gender collective named Viraam, addressing gender violence. Achievements 1. Awarded Vice Chancellor’s Gold Medal – JUIT – 2011 2. Awarded Director General’s Gold Medal in International Taxation and Transfer Pricing at National Academy of Direct Taxes, Nagpur 3. Invited by LBSNAA, Mussoorie for holding panel discussion on Gender for IAS Probationers on International Women’s Day 2021. <
